---
title: "Single-cell RNA-seq Pipeline"
subtitle: "Comprehensive analysis of single-cell transcriptomics data"
sidebar: scrnaseq
---

## Overview

This pipeline covers the analysis of single-cell RNA-sequencing data from raw reads to cell type annotation and downstream analysis.

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Raw FASTQ] --> B[Cell Ranger]
    B --> C[QC & Filtering]
    C --> D[Normalization]
    D --> E[Integration]
    E --> F[Clustering]
    F --> G[Annotation]
    
    style A fill:#e74c3c,color:white
    style B fill:#f39c12,color:white
    style C fill:#3498db,color:white
    style D fill:#9b59b6,color:white
    style E fill:#1abc9c,color:white
    style F fill:#27ae60,color:white
    style G fill:#2c3e50,color:white
```

## Pipeline Steps

::: {.pipeline-card}
### 1. Cell Ranger Processing
[**Read More →**](01-cellranger.qmd)

Demultiplexing, alignment, and UMI counting with Cell Ranger.

::: {.tag-cloud}
[Cell Ranger]{.tag}
[FASTQ]{.tag}
[10x Genomics]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.pipeline-card}
### 2. Quality Control & Filtering
[**Read More →**](02-qc-filtering.qmd)

Filtering cells based on QC metrics: UMI counts, gene counts, and mitochondrial content.

::: {.tag-cloud}
[Seurat]{.tag}
[R]{.tag}
[QC]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.pipeline-card}
### 3. Normalization & Feature Selection
[**Read More →**](03-normalization.qmd)

Data normalization and identification of highly variable genes.

::: {.tag-cloud}
[SCTransform]{.tag}
[Seurat]{.tag}
[HVGs]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.pipeline-card}
### 4. Dimensionality Reduction & Clustering
[**Read More →**](04-clustering.qmd)

PCA, UMAP visualization, and unsupervised clustering.

::: {.tag-cloud}
[PCA]{.tag}
[UMAP]{.tag}
[Louvain]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.pipeline-card}
### 5. Cell Type Annotation
[**Read More →**](05-annotation.qmd)

Automated and manual cell type annotation.

::: {.tag-cloud}
[SingleR]{.tag}
[Markers]{.tag}
[Annotation]{.tag}
:::
:::

## Quick Start


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
# Install required packages
install.packages("Seurat")
BiocManager::install(c("SingleR", "celldex", "scran", "scater"))

# Load Seurat
library(Seurat)

# Read 10x data
data <- Read10X("path/to/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/")
seurat_obj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = data, project = "MyProject")
```
:::


## Required Inputs

| Input | Description | Source |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| Raw FASTQ files | Sequencing reads | Sequencer |
| Reference genome | Cell Ranger reference | 10x Genomics |
| Sample metadata | Sample information | User-provided |

## Expected Outputs

- Quality control reports
- Filtered count matrices
- UMAP/tSNE visualizations
- Cluster assignments
- Cell type annotations
- Marker gene lists
- Differential expression between clusters

## Recommended Resources

- [Seurat Tutorial](https://satijalab.org/seurat/)
- [OSCA Book](https://bioconductor.org/books/release/OSCA/)
- [10x Genomics Resources](https://www.10xgenomics.com/resources)
